info.name: Returns a Collection of Instance Sandboxes

params.name: instanceId
params.description: ID associated with the instance

params.name: summaryExclude
params.description: Comma-separated list of summary fields to exclude from user summary

params.name: summaryInclude
params.description: Comma-separated list of summary fields to include in user summary

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: startingAfterId
params.description: Exclusive ID from which to begin querying

params.name: endingBeforeId
params.description: Exclusive ID at which to end querying

params.name: limit
params.description: How many items to return

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: includeDeleted
params.description: If the result of the request should also include deleted sandboxes.

items.docs: Returns a Collection of Instance Sandboxes
